text: ICAR-Central Agroforestry Research Institute Jhansi :: Uttar Pradesh Farm Calendar-2022 . No. Month Activity . January . Need-based cultural operations in rabi season crops/germplasm blocks/seed orchards . Preparation of tentative list of input requirements . Preparation of tentative list of farm produce with periodicity . Price fixation of farm produce (tentative) . Interaction meeting with scientists and stakeholders . February . Need-based cultural operations in rabi season crops . Auction of farm produces (Ber fruits etc.) . Initiation of demo agroforestry model with flower plants/crops . Deepening of existing water resources/excavation of new ponds . Observing open day on Basant Panchami . March . Need-based work in rabi season crops . Initiation of the certification process for model nursery . Initiation of composting pits . April . Auction of summer season guava fruits . Harvesting/threshing/winnowing operations of rabi season crops . Interaction meeting with scientists and stakeholders . Maintenance of biological units such as organic manure unit/vermicompost/FYM etc. . Observing open day on Baishakhi . Inputs purchasing for kharif season crops . May . Storage/price-fixing /sale of rabi season crops . Pruning operations in tree plants/ber . Need-based irrigation in established plants/germplasm blocks/seed orchards . Initiation of field preparation for kharif season crops . Monitoring and maintenance of farm implements for kharif sowing . Visit by dignitaries and farmers . Interaction with farm incharges of neighboring institutes . Disiltaion of ponds . Sale/auction of lemongrass

10. Insurance renewal of motorcycle (UP 93 V7891) 11. Initiation of Annual Rate Contract (ARC) for farm works . June . Need-based irrigation in established plants/germplasm blocks/seed orchards . Field preparation for kharif season crops . Sowing of kharif season crops . Field day kharif season . Maintenance of drainage channels . Sale/auction of fuelwood/pruned material . Finalization of Annual Rate Contract (ARC) for farm works . July . Sowing of kharif season crops . Irrigation schedule . Interaction meeting with scientists and stakeholder . Implementation of Annual Rate Contract (ARC) for farm works . August . Need-based cultural operations in kharif season crops . Inputs purchasing for rabi season crops . Monitoring of water source and water bodies for water storage capacity . September . Need-based cultural operations in kharif season crops . Land preparation and sowing of rabi season crops (rapeseed & mustard) . Harvesting/threshing/winnowing of kharif season crops . Monitoring and maintenance of farm implements for rabi season sowing . Monitoring of water pumps, pipelines, electricity lines for irrigation facility through canal 10. October . Harvesting/threshing/winnowing of kharif season crops . Storage/price fixation/sale of kharif season crops . Land preparation and sowing of rabi season crop (gram) . Field day rabi season . Interaction meeting with scientists and stakeholder . Sale/auction of lemongrass . Insurance renewal of Tractors (UP 93 AG0342; UP 93 AG 0227; UP 93 AG 0336) 11. November . Auction of bael, aonla and guava fruits . Sowing of rabi season crops . Pruning of MPTs 12. December . Need-based cultural operations in rabi season crops . Annual store verification *Preparation of consolidated statement of labours indent and administrative approval (last week of every month) * Processing of labour bills for payment (First week of every month) * POL purchase every month * Servicing and repair of implements (need-based) *Monthly store stock check and verification*Monthly dry run of motors and machines*Need based FAC meetings *Quarterly meetings with PL, estate and other relevant sections * Six monthly workshops on: () Farm management and () Nursery management
